tests_run: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_cursorless_macos.py -v: 6 passed

notes.ty_hook_issue: The ty_validator.py hook blocks on pre-existing pydantic unresolved-import because uvx ty check runs without --python .venv. This is not caused by this change. Recommend adding --python .venv to the hook invocation.
notes.test_api_adjustment: Tests use computer.ainvoke() instead of computer() because @Tool decorator returns a Tool instance, not the raw async function. This matches the pattern used by all other tests in the project (test_browser_tool_page_usage.py, test_local_agents.py, etc.).
notes.is_success_vs_success: Task spec referenced result.is_success but ToolResult dataclass uses result.success. Tests assert result.success.
